User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the LaunchPad Link application, authenticated via an external system (e.g., Google). This entity stores essential user profile information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity, typically provided by the external authentication system (e.g., Google user ID).

email.description: The primary email address of the user, as provided by the authentication system.

displayName.description: The user's display name or full name, suitable for public display.

profilePictureUrl.description: A URL pointing to the user's profile picture or avatar image.

isAdmin.description: Flag indicating if the user has administrative privileges.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user's record was first created in the application's database.

lastLoginAt.description: Timestamp indicating the most recent time the user successfully logged into the application.

GlobalConfig.title: GlobalConfig
GlobalConfig.description: Stores global application settings managed by administrators.

mobileImageUrl.description: The URL of the image to be displayed in the mobile home view.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last configuration update.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: configId
params.description: The ID of the configuration document (e.g., 'general').

firestore.reasoning: Data is structured to allow granular user profiles and a separate collection for global settings. Users can only access their own profile, while admins can manage the global config which is readable by all users.
